title: Dave Eggers told OpenAI staff that ChatGPT was ‘silencing an entire generation’
summary: The author used Sam Altmans invitation to give a speech as an opportunity to lash out. Last year, Sam Altman invited author Dave Eggers to give a talk to around 200 OpenAI staffers.
